pattern: 現在簡單式:習慣與事實(第三人稱單數動詞+s)
zh: 表示習慣或事實;主詞是他/她/它(單數)時,動詞要加 s/es
ex: The post office opens at eight every day.
exZh: 郵局每天八點開門。
q: She ___ to work by bus every day.
note: 主詞 She 是單數,現在簡單式動詞要加 es → goes。
signalNote: 看到 every day(每天)→ 表習慣,用現在簡單式。

qbank.q: She ___ to work by bus every day.
qbank.note: 主詞 She 單數,現在簡單式加 es → goes。

qbank.q: The post office ___ at eight every morning.
qbank.note: 主詞單數,習慣動作 → opens。

qbank.q: He ___ the newspaper every day.
qbank.note: He 單數,現在簡單式 → reads。

qbank.q: They ___ in this office.
qbank.note: 主詞 They 複數,動詞用原形 → work。

qbank.q: My father ___ letters every week.
qbank.note: My father 單數,習慣 → sends。

qbank.q: Water ___ at 100 degrees.
qbank.note: 科學事實,用現在簡單式;主詞單數 → boils。

contrast.stem: She ___ to work by bus every day.

pattern: 現在進行式:be + V-ing
zh: 表示此刻正在發生的動作;常見提示 now、Look!、Listen!
ex: Look! The mailman is delivering a package now.
exZh: 看!郵差正在送包裹。
q: Listen! The phone ___ now.
note: Listen! 表示此刻正在發生,用 be + V-ing → is ringing。
signalNote: 看到 Look! / Listen! / now → 此刻正在發生,用 be + V-ing。

qbank.q: Listen! The phone ___ now.
qbank.note: Listen! 表此刻,用 be + V-ing → is ringing。

qbank.q: Look! The mailman ___ a package now.
qbank.note: Look! + now → is delivering。

qbank.q: They ___ the boxes right now.
qbank.note: right now,主詞 They → are checking。

qbank.q: Be quiet! The baby ___ now.
qbank.note: 此刻正在進行 → is sleeping。

qbank.q: Look! It ___ outside.
qbank.note: Look! 表此刻 → is raining。

qbank.q: I ___ a letter now.
qbank.note: 主詞 I + now → am writing。

pattern: 過去簡單式:V-ed 或不規則過去式
zh: 表示過去已結束的動作;常見提示 yesterday、ago、last...
ex: I sent the letter yesterday.
exZh: 我昨天寄了那封信。
q: We ___ the package last week.
note: last week 是過去時間,動詞用過去式 → received。
signalNote: 看到 yesterday / ago / last… → 過去已結束,用過去式。

qbank.q: We ___ the package last week.
qbank.note: last week 過去時間 → received。

qbank.q: I ___ the letter yesterday.
qbank.note: yesterday → 過去式 sent。

qbank.q: She ___ to Taipei two days ago.
qbank.note: ago 表過去 → went。

qbank.q: They ___ the office last Monday.
qbank.note: last Monday 過去 → cleaned。

qbank.q: He ___ a new bike last year.
qbank.note: last year 過去,buy 不規則 → bought。

qbank.q: The train ___ ten minutes ago.
qbank.note: ago 表過去,leave → left。

confuse.note: 有明確過去時間 last night,要用過去式,不用現在完成式 → finished。

pattern: 未來式:will + 原形動詞
zh: 表示未來會發生的事,或當下做的決定
ex: I will deliver your package tomorrow.
exZh: 我明天會把你的包裹送到。
q: He ___ call you tomorrow.
note: tomorrow 表未來,用 will + 原形動詞。
signalNote: 看到 tomorrow / 當下的決定 → 用 will + 原形。

qbank.q: He ___ call you tomorrow.
qbank.note: tomorrow 表未來 → will + 原形。

qbank.q: I ___ deliver your package tomorrow.
qbank.note: 未來動作 → will deliver。

qbank.q: They ___ arrive next week.
qbank.note: next week 表未來 → will arrive。

qbank.q: She thinks it ___ rain later.
qbank.note: 預測未來 → will rain。

qbank.q: We ___ help you if you need it.
qbank.note: 當下決定/承諾 → will help。

qbank.q: The shop ___ open at nine tomorrow.
qbank.note: tomorrow 表未來 → will open。

confuse.q: Look at those clouds! It ___ rain soon.
confuse.note: 眼前有跡象(烏雲)的預測,用 be going to,不用 will → is going to。

pattern: 未來式:be going to + 原形動詞
zh: 表示計畫好的未來,或有跡象的預測
ex: We are going to move next month.
exZh: 我們下個月要搬家。
q: They ___ going to open a new shop.
note: 主詞 They 用 are;be going to + 原形 表計畫。
signalNote: 看到 be going to + 原形 → 計畫好的未來;主詞決定 am/is/are。

qbank.q: They ___ going to open a new shop.
qbank.note: 主詞 They → are going to。

qbank.q: We ___ going to move next month.
qbank.note: 主詞 We → are。

qbank.q: She ___ going to take the exam.
qbank.note: 主詞 She 單數 → is going to。

qbank.q: I ___ going to visit my aunt.
qbank.note: 主詞 I → am going to。

qbank.q: He is going to ___ a letter later.
qbank.note: be going to 後接原形 → write。

qbank.q: It ___ going to rain this afternoon.
qbank.note: 主詞 It → is going to。

pattern: 過去進行式:was/were + V-ing
zh: 表示過去某時刻正在進行的動作,常被另一個短動作打斷
ex: I was reading when the bell rang.
exZh: 鈴響時我正在看書。
q: She ___ cooking when I came home.
note: 主詞 She 用 was;過去進行式 = was + V-ing。
signalNote: 過去某時正在進行、被一個短動作(when…)打斷 → was/were + V-ing。

qbank.q: She ___ cooking when I came home.
qbank.note: 主詞 She → was + V-ing。

qbank.q: They ___ working when the boss called.
qbank.note: 主詞 They → were + V-ing。

qbank.q: I ___ reading when the bell rang.
qbank.note: 主詞 I 過去進行 → was reading。

qbank.q: We ___ waiting when the bus arrived.
qbank.note: 主詞 We → were waiting。

qbank.q: He was ___ TV when the lights went out.
qbank.note: was + V-ing → watching。

qbank.q: The kids ___ playing when it started to rain.
qbank.note: 主詞 The kids 複數 → were playing。

pattern: 現在完成式:have/has + 過去分詞(p.p.)
zh: 表示從過去持續到現在,或剛完成;常見 for、since、already、yet
ex: I have worked here for three years.
exZh: 我在這裡工作三年了。
q: She ___ already finished her work.
note: 主詞 She 用 has;already 是完成式提示 → has finished。
signalNote: 看到 for / since / already / yet → 從過去到現在,用 have/has + p.p.。

qbank.q: She ___ already finished her work.
qbank.note: 主詞 She + already → has finished。

qbank.q: I ___ worked here for three years.
qbank.note: 主詞 I + for → have worked。

qbank.q: They ___ lived here since 2020.
qbank.note: 主詞 They + since → have lived。

qbank.q: He ___ just sent the email.
qbank.note: 主詞 He + just → has sent。

qbank.q: We ___ not received the package yet.
qbank.note: 主詞 We + yet → have not received。

qbank.q: She has ___ this book before.
qbank.note: has + 過去分詞,read 三態同形 → read。

confuse.note: since 表從過去持續到現在,用現在完成式,不用過去式 → have lived。

pattern: 被動語態-現在:am/is/are + 過去分詞
zh: 主詞「被」做某事(現在)
ex: These boxes are checked every morning.
exZh: 這些箱子每天早上都會被檢查。
q: The mail ___ delivered every day.
note: 主詞 mail 為單數,現在被動 = is + p.p. → is delivered。
signalNote: 主詞是「被」做動作 + 現在 → am/is/are + 過去分詞。

qbank.q: The mail ___ delivered every day.
qbank.note: 主詞 mail 單數,現在被動 → is delivered。

qbank.q: These boxes ___ checked every morning.
qbank.note: 主詞 boxes 複數 → are checked。

qbank.q: English ___ spoken in many countries.
qbank.note: 主詞 English 單數 → is spoken。

qbank.q: The rooms ___ cleaned every day.
qbank.note: 主詞 rooms 複數 → are cleaned。

qbank.q: This form ___ used by everyone.
qbank.note: 主詞 form 單數 → is used。

qbank.q: The letters are ___ at noon.
qbank.note: be + 過去分詞 → are sorted。

pattern: 被動語態-過去:was/were + 過去分詞
zh: 主詞「被」做某事(過去)
ex: The meal was prepared by the chef.
exZh: 那餐是由廚師準備的。
q: The letter ___ yesterday.
note: 過去被動 = was/were + 過去分詞 → was sent。
signalNote: 主詞被做動作 + 過去 → was/were + 過去分詞;動作者用 by。

qbank.q: The letter ___ yesterday.
qbank.note: 過去被動 → was sent。

qbank.q: The meal ___ by the chef.
qbank.note: 過去被動 + by → was prepared。

qbank.q: These boxes ___ last night.
qbank.note: 主詞複數,過去被動 → were checked。

qbank.q: The window ___ by the storm.
qbank.note: 主詞單數,過去被動 → was broken。

qbank.q: The packages ___ this morning.
qbank.note: 主詞複數,過去被動 → were delivered。

qbank.q: The house was ___ in 1990.
qbank.note: was + 過去分詞,build → built。

pattern: 動詞後接不定詞 (to + 原形)
zh: want、hope、decide、plan、need 等後面接 to V
ex: She decided to take the job.
exZh: 她決定接下這份工作。
q: I want ___ a reservation.
note: want 後面接不定詞 → to make。
signalNote: want / hope / decide / plan / need 後 → to + 原形。

qbank.q: I want ___ a reservation.
qbank.note: want 後接不定詞 → to make。

qbank.q: She decided ___ the job.
qbank.note: decide 後接不定詞 → to take。

qbank.q: They hope ___ early.
qbank.note: hope 後接不定詞 → to arrive。

qbank.q: We plan ___ next week.
qbank.note: plan 後接不定詞 → to move。

qbank.q: He needs ___ a doctor.
qbank.note: need 後接不定詞 → to see。

qbank.q: I would like ___ some help.
qbank.note: would like 後接不定詞 → to get。

confuse.q: She enjoys ___, but she wants ___ a break now.
confuse.note: enjoy 後接動名詞 reading,want 後接不定詞 to take。

pattern: 動詞後接動名詞 (V-ing)
zh: enjoy、finish、avoid、suggest 等後面接 V-ing
ex: They enjoy working together.
exZh: 他們喜歡一起工作。
q: She avoided ___ the question.
note: avoid 後面接動名詞,不接不定詞 → answering。
signalNote: enjoy / finish / avoid / suggest 後 → V-ing。

qbank.q: She avoided ___ the question.
qbank.note: avoid 後接動名詞 → answering。

qbank.q: They enjoy ___ together.
qbank.note: enjoy 後接動名詞 → working。

qbank.q: I finished ___ the report.
qbank.note: finish 後接動名詞 → writing。

qbank.q: He suggested ___ a taxi.
qbank.note: suggest 後接動名詞 → taking。

qbank.q: Would you mind ___ the door?
qbank.note: mind 後接動名詞 → closing。

qbank.q: We kept ___ for the bus.
qbank.note: keep 後接動名詞 → waiting。

confuse.q: I finished ___ the letter and decided ___ it today.
confuse.note: finish 後接動名詞 writing,decide 後接不定詞 to send。

pattern: 介系詞 + 動名詞 (V-ing)
zh: after、before、without、by 等介系詞後面動詞用 V-ing
ex: Check the address before sending the letter.
exZh: 寄信前先核對地址。
q: Wash your hands before ___ lunch.
note: before 是介系詞,後面動詞用 V-ing → eating。
signalNote: after / before / without / by 等介系詞後 → V-ing。

qbank.q: Wash your hands before ___ lunch.
qbank.note: before 是介系詞,後接 V-ing → eating。

qbank.q: Check the address before ___ the letter.
qbank.note: before + V-ing → sending。

qbank.q: He left without ___ goodbye.
qbank.note: without 後接 V-ing → saying。

qbank.q: You can save time by ___ online.
qbank.note: by 後接 V-ing → paying。

qbank.q: After ___ the box, she sealed it.
qbank.note: after 後接 V-ing → packing。

qbank.q: She is good at ___ problems.
qbank.note: at 是介系詞,後接 V-ing → solving。

pattern: 關係代名詞 who(指人,主格)
zh: 先行詞是「人」且在子句中當主詞時,用 who
ex: The teacher who helped me is kind.
exZh: 幫助我的那位老師人很好。
q: The man ___ called you is my uncle.
note: 先行詞是人、且在子句中當主詞,用 who。
signalNote: 先行詞是「人」、在子句裡當主詞 → who。

qbank.q: The man ___ called you is my uncle.
qbank.note: 先行詞是人、當主詞 → who。

qbank.q: I met a girl ___ speaks five languages.
qbank.note: 先行詞 girl 是人、當主詞 → who。

qbank.q: The teacher ___ helped me is kind.
qbank.note: 先行詞 teacher 是人 → who。

qbank.q: He is the worker ___ delivers our mail.
qbank.note: 先行詞 worker 是人、當主詞 → who。

qbank.q: The people ___ live here are friendly.
qbank.note: 先行詞 people 是人 → who。

qbank.q: I know the boy ___ won the prize.
qbank.note: 先行詞 boy 是人、當主詞 → who。

contrast.stem: The man ___ called you is my uncle.

confuse.q: The box ___ arrived today and the man ___ sent it are both here.
confuse.note: 先行詞 box 是物用 which;man 是人當主詞用 who。

pattern: 關係代名詞 which / that(指物)
zh: 先行詞是「物」時,用 which 或 that 連接
ex: The box which arrived today is heavy.
exZh: 今天送到的那個箱子很重。
q: This is the letter ___ came this morning.
note: 先行詞 letter 是物,用 which(或 that)。
signalNote: 先行詞是「物」→ which 或 that。

qbank.q: This is the letter ___ came this morning.
qbank.note: 先行詞 letter 是物 → which。

qbank.q: The box ___ arrived today is heavy.
qbank.note: 先行詞 box 是物 → which。

qbank.q: I like the book ___ you gave me.
qbank.note: 先行詞 book 是物 → which。

qbank.q: The bus ___ goes downtown is late.
qbank.note: 先行詞 bus 是物 → which。

qbank.q: Here is the form ___ you need.
qbank.note: 先行詞 form 是物 → which。

qbank.q: The shop ___ sells stamps is closed.
qbank.note: 先行詞 shop 是物 → which。

contrast.stem: This is the letter ___ came this morning.

confuse.q: The girl ___ won and the prize ___ she got are in the news.
confuse.note: 先行詞 girl 是人用 who;prize 是物用 which。

pattern: 關係代名詞 whose(所有格)
zh: 表示「…的」,連接所屬關係,人或物皆可
ex: The man whose car is red works here.
exZh: 那台紅色車子的車主在這裡工作。
q: I know a girl ___ father is a mailman.
note: 表示「她的父親」這種所屬關係,用 whose。
signalNote: 表「…的」所屬關係(人或物皆可)→ whose。

qbank.q: I know a girl ___ father is a mailman.
qbank.note: 表「她的父親」所屬 → whose。

qbank.q: The man ___ car is red works here.
qbank.note: 表「他的車」所屬 → whose。

qbank.q: That is the house ___ roof is blue.
qbank.note: 表「它的屋頂」所屬 → whose。

qbank.q: She is the writer ___ books are famous.
qbank.note: 表「她的書」所屬 → whose。

qbank.q: I met a boy ___ sister is my classmate.
qbank.note: 表「他的妹妹」所屬 → whose。

qbank.q: This is the dog ___ owner lives next door.
qbank.note: 表「它的主人」所屬 → whose。

contrast.stem: I know a girl ___ father is a mailman.

confuse.q: The man ___ is here and the man ___ bag is here are different.
confuse.note: 當主詞用 who;表「他的包」所屬用 whose。

pattern: 條件句:If + 現在式, 主詞 + will + 原形
zh: 表示「如果…就會…」的真實、可能情況
ex: If it rains, I will take a taxi.
exZh: 如果下雨,我就搭計程車。
q: If you hurry, you ___ catch the train.
note: 真實條件:if 子句用現在式,主句用 will + 原形。
signalNote: 真實可能的條件:If + 現在式,主句 will + 原形。

qbank.q: If you hurry, you ___ catch the train.
qbank.note: 真實條件主句用 will → will catch。

qbank.q: If it rains, I ___ take a taxi.
qbank.note: 真實條件主句 → will take。

qbank.q: If she calls, I ___ answer.
qbank.note: 真實條件主句 → will answer。

qbank.q: If they come, we ___ start.
qbank.note: 真實條件主句 → will start。

qbank.q: If you ___ hard, you will pass.
qbank.note: if 子句用現在式 → study。

qbank.q: If the bus is late, we ___ wait.
qbank.note: 真實條件主句 → will wait。

contrast.stem: If it rains, I ___ a taxi.

pattern: 假設語氣-與現在事實相反:If + 過去式, 主詞 + would + 原形
zh: 對「現在」的相反假設(其實不是這樣)
ex: If I were you, I would study harder.
exZh: 如果我是你,我會更用功。
q: If I ___ you, I would take the job.
note: 與現在相反,be 動詞一律用 were。
signalNote: 與現在事實相反:If + 過去式(be 用 were),主句 would + 原形。

qbank.q: If I ___ you, I would take the job.
qbank.note: 與現在相反,be 一律用 were。

qbank.q: If she ___ rich, she would travel a lot.
qbank.note: 與現在相反 → were。

qbank.q: If I were you, I ___ study harder.
qbank.note: 主句用 would + 原形 → would study。

qbank.q: If we ___ free, we would help.
qbank.note: 與現在相反 → were。

qbank.q: If he were here, he ___ know the answer.
qbank.note: 主句 would + 原形 → would know。

qbank.q: If they ___ closer, I would visit them.
qbank.note: 與現在相反,if 子句用過去式 → lived。

contrast.stem: If I ___ you, I would take the job.

pattern: 過去完成式:had + 過去分詞(進階)
zh: 表示「過去的過去」,比另一個過去動作更早完成;常見 by the time、before
ex: The train had left before we arrived.
exZh: 我們到達之前,火車已經開走了。
q: By the time I got there, the meeting ___ already ended.
note: 兩件過去的事,先發生的用過去完成式 had + 過去分詞。
signalNote: 兩件過去的事,更早的那件 → had + 過去分詞(進階)。

qbank.q: By the time I got there, the meeting ___ already ended.
qbank.note: 比另一過去動作更早 → had ended。

qbank.q: The train ___ left before we arrived.
qbank.note: 先發生的用過去完成式 → had left。

qbank.q: She ___ finished her work before the boss called.
qbank.note: 更早完成 → had finished。

confuse.q: When I arrived, the train ___ already ___.
confuse.note: 比「我到達」更早發生,用過去完成式 had left,不用過去式。

pattern: 假設語氣-與過去事實相反:If + had p.p., 主詞 + would have p.p.(進階)
zh: 對「過去」的相反假設(其實沒發生)
ex: If I had known, I would have helped you.
exZh: 如果我早知道,我就會幫你了。
q: If she ___ studied harder, she would have passed.
note: 與過去相反:If + had + 過去分詞。
signalNote: 與過去事實相反:If + had p.p.,主句 would have p.p.(進階)。

qbank.q: If she ___ studied harder, she would have passed.
qbank.note: 與過去相反:If + had + 過去分詞 → had studied。

qbank.q: If I had known, I ___ helped you.
qbank.note: 主句用 would have + 過去分詞 → would have helped。

qbank.q: If they had left earlier, they ___ caught the train.
qbank.note: 與過去相反,主句 would have + p.p. → would have caught。

contrast.stem: If I had known, I ___ you.

pattern: 連接詞:although / though(雖然)
zh: 表示讓步、對比;「雖然…」,同句不可再加 but
ex: Although it was late, he kept working.
exZh: 雖然很晚了,他仍繼續工作。
q: ___ it was raining, we still went out.
note: 前後語意相反,用 Although 表「雖然」。
signalNote: 前後語意相反、表讓步「雖然」→ Although;同句不可再加 but。

qbank.q: ___ it was raining, we still went out.
qbank.note: 前後相反,用 Although。

qbank.q: ___ it was late, he kept working.
qbank.note: 讓步語氣 → Although。

qbank.q: ___ she was tired, she finished the job.
qbank.note: 前後相反 → Although。

qbank.q: ___ the test was hard, he passed.
qbank.note: 讓步 → Although。

qbank.q: ___ he is young, he works very hard.
qbank.note: 前後相反 → Although。

qbank.q: ___ it cost a lot, they bought it.
qbank.note: 讓步語氣 → Although。

contrast.stem: ___ it was raining, we still went out.

confuse.q: ___ it was raining, we still went out.
confuse.note: 用 Although 開頭,同句就不能再加 but;單用 Although 即可。

pattern: because + 句子 / because of + 名詞
zh: because 後接「主詞+動詞」,because of 後接「名詞」
ex: We stayed home because of the storm.
exZh: 我們因為暴風雨待在家。
q: The flight was late ___ the bad weather.
note: 後面是名詞片語 the bad weather,要用 because of。
signalNote: 後面是名詞 → because of;後面是「主詞+動詞」→ because。

qbank.q: The flight was late ___ the bad weather.
qbank.note: 後面是名詞片語 → because of。

qbank.q: We stayed home ___ the storm.
qbank.note: 後面是名詞 the storm → because of。

qbank.q: He was tired ___ he worked all night.
qbank.note: 後面是主詞+動詞 → because。

qbank.q: The road is wet ___ the rain.
qbank.note: 後面是名詞 the rain → because of。

qbank.q: She was happy ___ she passed the exam.
qbank.note: 後面是句子 → because。

qbank.q: They closed the shop ___ the holiday.
qbank.note: 後面是名詞 the holiday → because of。

contrast.stem: The flight was late ___ the bad weather.

confuse.q: We stayed home ___ the storm, and ___ it was dangerous.
confuse.note: 後接名詞 the storm 用 because of;後接句子 it was dangerous 用 because。

pattern: too + 形容詞 + to V(太…以致於不能…)
zh: 表示程度過頭,結果做不到某事
ex: He was too tired to finish the work.
exZh: 他太累了,無法完成工作。
q: The box is ___ heavy to carry.
note: too + 形容詞 + to V = 太…而不能…。
signalNote: too + 形容詞 + to V = 太…以致於不能…。

qbank.q: The box is ___ heavy to carry.
qbank.note: too + 形容詞 + to V → too heavy to carry。

qbank.q: He was ___ tired to finish the work.
qbank.note: too…to 句型 → too tired to。

qbank.q: It is too cold ___ go out.
qbank.note: too + 形容詞 + to V → to go。

qbank.q: She is ___ young to drive.
qbank.note: too…to → too young to drive。

qbank.q: The coffee was too hot ___ drink.
qbank.note: too…to V → to drink。

qbank.q: The bag is ___ small to hold everything.
qbank.note: too…to 句型 → too small to。

contrast.stem: The box is ___ heavy to carry.

items.zh: (需配 that 子句,不接 to V)

pattern: not only ... but also ...(不僅…而且…)
zh: 對稱連接兩個並列的詞或句,前後詞性要一致
ex: She is not only smart but also kind.
exZh: 她不僅聰明而且善良。
q: He speaks not only English ___ also Japanese.
note: 固定搭配 but also,前後詞性要對稱。
signalNote: 看到 not only → 後面要配 but also,前後詞性對稱。

qbank.q: He speaks not only English ___ also Japanese.
qbank.note: 固定搭配 not only…but also → but。

qbank.q: She is not only smart ___ also kind.
qbank.note: not only…but also → but。

qbank.q: The job is not only hard ___ also boring.
qbank.note: 配對 but also → but。

qbank.q: They sell not only stamps ___ also envelopes.
qbank.note: not only…but also → but。

qbank.q: He not only came ___ also helped.
qbank.note: 配對 but also → but。

qbank.q: It is not only cheap ___ also good.
qbank.note: not only…but also → but。

contrast.stem: She is not only smart ___ also kind.

pattern: had better + 原形動詞(最好…)
zh: 帶勸告語氣的「最好做某事」
ex: You had better see a doctor.
exZh: 你最好去看醫生。
q: You had better ___ early today.
note: had better 後面直接接原形動詞 → leave。
signalNote: had better(最好…,帶勸告)後面直接接原形動詞。

qbank.q: You had better ___ early today.
qbank.note: had better 後接原形 → leave。

qbank.q: You had better ___ a doctor.
qbank.note: had better 後接原形 → see。

qbank.q: We had better ___ now, or we'll be late.
qbank.note: had better 後接原形 → go。

qbank.q: She had better ___ her homework first.
qbank.note: had better 後接原形 → finish。

qbank.q: You had better not ___ late.
qbank.note: had better not + 原形 → be。

qbank.q: He had better ___ the address.
qbank.note: had better 後接原形 → check。
